name: trackship
description: WooCommerce shipment tracking. Query shipment status, checkpoints, orders, stores, and account info from your TrackShip account.

tools.name: get_shipment
tools.description: Get the current status and full checkpoint history for a shipment by tracking number.

tracking_provider.description: Carrier slug (e.g. usps, fedex, ups). Optional — TrackShip will auto-detect if omitted.

tools.name: list_shipments
tools.description: List shipments with optional filters by carrier, status, and date range. Supports pagination.

tracking_provider.description: Filter by carrier slug (e.g. usps, fedex, ups)

status.description: Filter by tracking_event_status: delivered, in_transit, exception, pending, pre_transit

tools.name: get_order_tracking
tools.description: Get all shipments and their tracking status linked to a WooCommerce order ID.

tools.name: list_stores
tools.description: List all stores connected to your TrackShip account.

tools.name: get_account_plan
tools.description: Get your current TrackShip plan name, shipment usage, limit, and renewal date.
